title: 🏙️ Helsinki Region — HSY (Portolan catalog)
description: A Portolan spatial-data catalog whose SOURCE is this git repository (STAC + Apache Iceberg table files) and which is PUBLISHED to an object-storage bucket as a static Iceberg REST catalog. Regional planning data from Helsinki Region Environmental Services (HSY). Two ways to read it, no server in either: ATTACH the bucket endpoint as an Iceberg REST catalog (DuckDB or Snowflake), or iceberg_scan() a dataset's metadata.json directly. Contribute data or report issues via pull requests / issues on this repository — a merge re-publishes to the bucket automatically.

portolan:contributions.note: INTERIM / NOT SOVEREIGN — GitHub Pages is US-hosted (Fastly CDN). Demonstrates the repo-as-catalog model; the sovereign form is the same static files on EU infrastructure (e.g. UpCloud object storage, or self-hosted Forgejo Pages).

links.title: Same catalogue as OGC API - Records
Report issues or contribute data (GitHub — interim, not sovereign)
